title: Bootstrapped simplified codebase wiki
summary: Created starter research/specs/roadmap contract for codewiki.

title: Fed package repo with live simplified wiki docs
summary: Added package self-docs, research notes from LLM Wiki inspiration, and roadmap items for ongoing refactor work.

title: Added roadmap append workflow for drift audits
summary: Drift prompts now emit roadmap-ready tasks and package tool appends new roadmap entries with automatic ids and rebuild.

title: Linked Pi sessions to roadmap tasks
summary: Added task-session link tool and Pi custom session entry integration for roadmap navigation.

title: Removed repo-owned task-session index cache
summary: Task links now persist only in Pi sessions, roadmap-state became session-free v2, and the widget overlays current-session focus at runtime.

title: Added roadmap task update and close workflow
summary: Package now mutates existing roadmap tasks through codewiki_roadmap_update, logs mutation history, and rebuilds generated outputs after update or close.

title: Standardized compact history strategy
summary: Package now explicitly treats git as full history, `.wiki/events.jsonl` as lifecycle log, and `.wiki/roadmap-events.jsonl` as roadmap mutation history without generating a separate compact-history artifact by default.

title: Renamed package surface to codewiki
summary: Package metadata, extension and skill directories, tool identifiers, widget keys, docs, and repo references now use codewiki naming.

title: Reviewed codewiki skill and global AGENTS overlay
summary: Skill and global AGENTS guidance were checked against the Karpathy-inspired baseline, aligned on codewiki naming, and split from the remaining wiki/.wiki migration work.

title: Added wiki-code roadmap implementation command
summary: Public command surface now includes /wiki-code for resuming focused or next-open roadmap implementation while wiki mutations remain automatic behind agent workflows.

title: Migrated self-hosted repo to wiki and .wiki
summary: Codewiki now prefers `.wiki/config.json` with legacy `.docs/config.json` fallback, bootstraps new repos into wiki/.wiki by default, and dogfoods that structure in its own repo.

title: Added explicit repo targeting and project picker fallback
summary: Public wiki commands now accept explicit repo paths, can discover candidate repos below current cwd for UI picker fallback, and explain global-vs-local targeting clearly when no repo-local wiki is found.

title: Added explicit repo targeting to internal codewiki tools
summary: Internal codewiki tools now accept optional repoPath so global installs can setup, rebuild, inspect, and mutate repo-local wikis even when Pi is running outside the target repo.

title: Build a task todo-research-implement-verify-done loop with evidence gates
summary: Replaced the old implement-review-verify-close-candidate loop with a unified todo-research-implement-verify-done model across roadmap specs, generated read models, runtime resume logic, kanban columns, and smoke coverage. The runtime now starts todo tasks in research, advances verify directly to done, keeps blocked as evidence/card state rather than a main column, and uses a compartmentalized phase-driver registry for research, implement, and verify transitions.

title: Refactor status panel around Wiki, Roadmap, Agents, and Channels
summary: Applied live panel follow-up fixes from dogfooding: removed repeated gray section preambles, rendered Wiki as three side-by-side Product/System/Clients columns, rendered Roadmap as board-only kanban content with populated task columns, and stopped Channels Enter from opening wiki-config.

title: Refactor status panel around Wiki, Roadmap, Agents, and Channels
summary: Added section-local cursor navigation and detail panes to the status panel: Tab now switches major sections, arrows move within the active section, roadmap/wiki headers render as accent-colored standalone rows, roadmap columns show up to five visible tasks, and Channels now opens a detail pane that can create or edit stored channel rows instead of bouncing into wiki-config.

title: Refactor status panel around Wiki, Roadmap, Agents, and Channels
summary: Refined the status panel interaction model: column navigation now allows moving onto empty columns without snapping away, selected columns can scroll through more items, added reusable detail-window helpers for wiki/task/agent/channel views, and fixed channel add/edit by suspending the panel widget during prompted field entry so saved channels persist correctly.

title: Refactor status panel around Wiki, Roadmap, Agents, and Channels
summary: Extended the reusable status-panel detail window with richer roadmap task content and task-local actions. Roadmap detail now shows outcome, success signals, verification, spec/code paths, and evidence, and exposes Resume and Block actions through an action row navigated with left/right plus Enter.

title: Refactor status panel around Wiki, Roadmap, Agents, and Channels

title: Refactor status panel around Wiki, Roadmap, Agents, and Channels
